name: cloudversify-calendar-ghost-integration
description: Ghost Custom integration and Code Injection foundation for Cloudversify Calendar booking.

scripts.check: node --check src/cloudversify-ghost-booking-element.js && node --check scripts/validate-ghost-integration.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-ghost-widget.mjs && node scripts/validate-ghost-integration.mjs && node scripts/smoke-ghost-widget.mjs
